catalogx.title: All 79 article families — with real article numbers.
catalogx.lead: Pipes, fittings, transition fittings, valves, weld-in saddles, accessories and tools — every row comes from the binding K-Aqua catalogue. Pick a category, expand an article, check the code.
catalogx.searchPlaceholder: Search article number or product name — e.g. "AQ200P20" or "Elbow"
catalogx.noResults: No matches — adjust the search or pick another category.

pipes.label: Pipes
pipes.desc: PP-R and PP-RCT pipes — standard, fibre-reinforced and UV-stabilised, 12 series.

fittings.label: Fittings
fittings.desc: Socket-fusion and electrofusion fittings, d20–d125, 13 article families.

transitionFittings.label: Transition Fittings
transitionFittings.desc: Transitions to thread and brass — for legacy connections and valves, 13 families.

valves.label: Valves
valves.desc: Ball valves, concealed valves, distribution manifolds — 9 article families.

weldInSaddles.label: Weld-in Saddles
weldInSaddles.desc: Branch connections without cutting the pipe — threaded and unthreaded, 3 families.

accessories.label: Accessories
accessories.desc: Pipe clamps, backing flanges, gaskets, plugs — 5 article families.

tools.label: Tools
tools.desc: Pipe cutters, welding machines and dies for all four jointing methods, 14 families.
